text.message: hey blue did u ever go to the russian bathhouse?
me and my gf were in almaty for 2 days and were gonna go but she got sick
How did you like the city? :)
but i think about the russian bathhouse sometimes
Is it worth visiting? I heard you can spend 5 days in Almaty but then its hard to get elsewhere?
i was very brief there, mainly on a trip to kyrgyzstan
If you ever will come back - hit me up on telegram @bsammy
Black too, if you plan to go here - hit me up :)
the area between almaty and karakol in kyrgyz was insanely beautiful
Yeah, Kyrgyzstan is beautiful as well, lots of nature
Did you drive the enitre way?
yeah we had a big car
nice, how long did it take?
man we drove that in 1 long ass day
only managed as far as Georgia
like 12 hours on the road with stops of like crazy nature
Did you see Medeo or Shymbulak in Almaty?
we had like 2 days only too :/
cos i wanted to stay there longer
i mean its good for you since you have 3 citiesalready
Red about to get a nice port
Probly gg this turn by green :)
